title: Volunteer Opportunities * Seasonal Workers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Volunteer Opportunities * Seasonal Workers 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Child Abuse Issues Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Foster Children Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST SEASONAL WORKERS ASSOCIATION 11 POINT BENEFIT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency food and clothing, preventive medical care, limited non-emergency dental, legal advice, job referrals, advocacy, and information and referral. Services are prioritized for members. Volunteers are provided with organizational skills and advocacy methods. 203 N Oakdale Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Seasonal and other low-income workers. Membership required. Services for members and their families are benefits of membership. Hours: 7 days per week 9am-9pm, including holidays Email (541) 773-6811 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST SEASONAL WORKERS ASSOCIATION 11 POINT BENEFIT PROGRAM
